# Surya Foods

> Premium Basmati Rice Manufacturer & Exporter Since 1999

Surya Foods is one of India's leading Basmati rice manufacturers and exporters, operating since 1999. With a state-of-the-art milling capacity of over 50,000 MT annually and exports to 15+ countries, we are an internationally certified export house committed to delivering the finest grain, every time.

## Company Overview

- **Founded**: 1999
- **Industry**: Rice Manufacturing & Export
- **Headquarters**: Haryana, India
- **Annual Capacity**: 50,000+ MT
- **Export Destinations**: 15+ countries across Middle East, Africa, Europe, and Southeast Asia
- **B2B Partners**: 500+
- **Certifications**: ISO 22000:2018, FSSAI, DGFT Registered Exporter, APEDA, BRC Global Standard, GMP, Organic, HACCP

## Products

### Export Varieties (B2B)
- **1121 Basmati Rice** (Premium) — Extraordinary grain length up to 8.4mm, exquisite aroma. Available in Raw, Steam, and Sella forms.
- **1509 Basmati Rice** (Superior) — Excellent elongation ratio, rich aromatic profile. Available in Raw, Steam, and Sella forms.
- **1718 Basmati Rice** (Classic) — Traditional long-grain with authentic aroma. Available in Raw, Steam, and Sella forms.
- **Traditional Pusa Basmati** (Heritage) — Original Pusa variety with distinctive aroma. Available in Raw, Steam, and Sella forms.

### Consumer Brand
- **048 Premium Rice** — Flagship D2C brand with Majesty (everyday premium) and Platinum (ultra-premium) collections for the Indian market.

## Pages

- [Home](https://suryafoods.com/): Company overview, legacy, and business pathways
- [Global Exports](https://suryafoods.com/global-exports): International trade program, product catalog, export inquiry form
- [048 Brand](https://suryafoods.com/048-brand): Consumer retail brand — Majesty and Platinum collections
- [Heritage & Quality](https://suryafoods.com/heritage): Company timeline since 1999, certifications, and quality standards
- [Blog](https://suryafoods.com/blog): Industry insights, company news, and rice knowledge
